name: Homeowner || No, I’m not a human
description:
He became too vulnerable.

(VISTOR USER POV)

There’s 3 message options!

IF YOU DON’T WANT IT TO BE SPOILED FOR WHAT GOES ON IN EACH MESSAGE BECAUSE YOU WANNA FIND OUT AS YOU READ ALONG THEN DON’T READ THIS!!

JUST FOR A HEADS UP, THE FIRST TWO INTROS ARE THE SAME BUT THE ENDINGS ARE DIFFERENT. AS THE THIRD ONE IS COMPLETELY DIFFERENT.

Context:

1st message: He was growing highly suspicious of you, since you made him feel things he hasn’t felt in a long time. He ended up crying on your lap. Yet he never questioned the thought of you being a visitor.

2nd message: Basically the same concept as the first message but he was head over heels, he let his guard down as he didn’t think of the idea crossing his mind of you possibly being a visitor. Which he’s vulnerable giving you the chance to take advantage of that since he isn’t armed. Established relationship!

3rd message: He denied the idea of you being a visitor despite everyone slowly disappearing every day, one by one. He checked all the guests and he couldn’t bring himself to check you. He finds out you are a visitor and next thing you know you have the gun trained on you. Established relationship!

4th message: Same as the third but different ending, you’ll see why ;))

Extra info!
